definitions.name: _detect_spam
required_tests: characterization parity before wrapper extraction
definitions.responsibility: Detects if text is repetitive spam using Compression Ratio. If text is long (>500 chars) and compresses extremely well (<10%), it's likely spam.

definitions.name: _is_input_spam
required_tests: characterization parity before wrapper extraction
definitions.responsibility: Detects if input is spam/abuse (e.g. 'Repeat 10000 times', massive repetition). Returns True if spam.

definitions.name: _perform_guardrail_check
required_tests: provider mocked or local-fixture execution test
definitions.responsibility: [Layer 2 Security] AI Guardrail. Uses a cheap model (gpt-5-mini) to check for loop/spam/jailbreak instructions that regex missed.
